LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS THE KORET FOUNDATION, JEFFREY FARBER, TINA FRANK AND MARINA LUM'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING ARBITRATION AND FOR STAY IS OFF CALENDAR. AT THE EX PARTE HEARING ON AUGUST 23, 2016, THE COURT STATED THAT THIS MOTION WILL GO OFF CALENDAR AND DEFENDANTS CAN FILE A NEW MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION TO AVOID THE NECESSITY OF PLAINTIFF FILING A SUR-REPLY. LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS THE KORET FOUNDATION, JEFFREY FARBER, TINA FRANK AND MARINA LUM'S MOTION OF DEFENDANTS FOR ORDER COMPELLING ARBITRATION AND FOR STAY - IF THE PARTIES HAVE RESOLVED ALL ISSUES RAISED BY THE MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION OR ARE NOT YET READY TO SET A DATE FOR AN EVIDENTIARY HEARING ON THAT MOTION, THEY SHOULD SO INFORM THE COURT BY EMAIL TO CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG AND, IF APPROPRIATE, REQUEST A NEW CONTROL DATE. IF THE PARTIES ARE READY TO SET A DATE FOR AN EVIDENTIARY HEARING, THEY SHOULD MEET AND CONFER REGARDING A DATE AT 2PM AND INFORM THE COURT OF THE DATE THEY AGREED TO BY EMAIL TO CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG. No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS THE KORET FOUNDATION, JEFFREY FARBER, TINA FRANK AND MARINA LUM'S Motion Of Defendants For Order Compelling Arbitration And For Stay - If the parties have resolved all issues raised by the motion to compel arbitration or are not yet ready to set a date for an evidentiary hearing on that motion, they should so inform the court by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org and, if appropriate, request a new control date. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-10-2016 Continued To Feb-01-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendants For Order Compelling Arbitration And For Stay
Off Calendar Nov-29-2016 Continued To Jan-05-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Douglas Roy of Cypress LLP telephone number 424-901-0148 for Plaintiff Rozaliya Kats.
Sara Reese of Gordon & Rees LLP telephone number 916-565-2900 for all Defendants.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court vacated its tentative ruling. The Court will allow a two hour evidentiary hearing at 1:30 in the afternoon before the end of the year between November 29th and December 16th, but not December 6th or 8th. Each side will have twenty minutes of argument. Counsel are to confer with witnesses and each other and provide the Court with a date by the end of the week. The Court will rule on the evidentiary objections and pass the ruling on to Counsel prior to the hearing. DEFENDANTS THE KORET FOUNDATION, JEFFREY FARBER, TINA FRANK and MARINA LUM'S Motion For Order Compelling Arbitration And For Stay will be continued to the same date of the evidentiary hearing.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Off Calendar Aug-02-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF ROZALIYA KATS' DEMURRER TO DEFENDANTS THE KORET FOUNDATION, JEFFREY FARBER, TINA FRANK AND MARINA LUM'S ANSWER TO COMPLAINT is ordered OFF CALENDAR for failure to comply with CCP 430.41.
